title: 4 Oversold High-Quality Tech Picks Amid Market Volatility

title: 3 Stocks To Consider in the Still-Attractive Semiconductor Industry
text: The Analog/Mixed Signal Semiconductor industry is particularly attractive given its secular growth drivers and reasonable valuations. SLAB, MPWR, and MCHP are looking good now.

title: Investors Pile Into 9 Stocks Every Single Time The Market Rallies

title: 4 Top-Ranked Semiconductor Stocks to Buy Amid Industry Growth

title: 5 Solid Stocks to Buy on Surging Semiconductor Sales
text: Semiconductor shortage is a boon in disguise for microchip sales, helping companies like Monolithic Power Systems (MPWR), Silicon Laboratories (SLAB), Texas Instruments (TXN), Vishay Intertechnology (VSH) and STMicroelectronics (STM).
